form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. McConnell submitted the following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title: Making minority party appointments for certain committees for the 111th Congress.

section.text: That the following be the minority membership on the following committees for the remainder of the 111th Congress, or until their successors are appointed:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Cochran, Mr. Bond, Mr. McConnell, Mr. Shelby, Mr. Gregg, Mr. Bennett, Mrs. Hutchison, Mr. Brownback, Mr. Alexander, Ms. Collins, Mr. Voinovich, and Ms. Murkowski.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on environment and public works:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Inhofe, Mr. Voinovich, Mr. Vitter, Mr. Barrasso, Mr. Crapo, Mr. Bond, and Mr. Alexander.
Mr. Sessions, Mr. Hatch, Mr. Grassley, Mr. Kyl, Mr. Graham, Mr. Cornyn, and Mr. Coburn.
Mr. Burr, Mr. Isakson, Mr. Wicker, Mr. Johanns, and Mr. Graham.
Mr. Martinez, Mr. Shelby, Ms. Collins, Republican Leader designee, Mr. Corker, Mr. Hatch, Mr. Brownback, and Mr. Graham.
